nodes.name: useOptimisticUpload.ts
nodes.summary: React hook that optimistically tracks attachment file uploads with inflight/error state, reconciling against the current attachment list.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel file re-exporting the useSlashCommandExecutor hook.

nodes.name: model-query.test.ts
nodes.summary: Unit tests for the model-query utilities, verifying argument normalization and model lookup by id/name.

nodes.name: model-query.ts
nodes.summary: Helpers for the /model slash command: normalizes the raw argument and resolves a model by id or name via exact-then-fuzzy matching.

nodes.name: prompt-result.test.ts
nodes.summary: Unit tests for resolveSlashPromptResult, covering prompt trimming and slash command label derivation.

nodes.name: prompt-result.ts
nodes.summary: Resolves the effective prompt text and display label produced by a slash command invocation.

nodes.name: useSlashCommandExecutor.ts
nodes.summary: React hook that parses and executes chat slash commands (reset, stop, model switch, MCP overview, and server-resolved prompts) with toast feedback and analytics.

nodes.name: types.ts
nodes.summary: Shared type definitions for the WorkspaceChatInterface, building on shared tab status types.

nodes.name: LinkedIssues
nodes.summary: Component that maps linked issues to removable LinkedIssuePill elements, invoking onRemove when a pill is dismissed.

nodes.name: getErrorMessage
nodes.summary: Coerces an unknown error value into a readable message string.

nodes.name: McpControls
nodes.summary: Component rendering the MCP overview picker wired to the useMcpUi hook state.

nodes.name: ModelPicker
nodes.summary: Renders the model picker popover, grouping models by provider, fetching and refetching Anthropic/OpenAI auth status, and navigating to model settings.

nodes.name: ModelProviderGroup
nodes.summary: Renders a provider-labeled group of selectable models, showing auth prompts and pending states for Anthropic and OpenAI, and handling model selection.

nodes.name: groupModelsByProvider
nodes.summary: Groups an ordered list of models into per-provider entries using a Map to preserve first-seen ordering.

nodes.name: useMcpUi
nodes.summary: Hook managing MCP overview state with callbacks to show/hide/refresh the overview, authenticate servers, and poll for updates on an interval.

nodes.name: useOptimisticUpload
nodes.summary: Hook that drives optimistic attachment uploads, tracking inflight uploads with refs, updating per-file entries on success/failure, and pruning stale entries.

nodes.name: normalizeModelQueryFromActionArgument
nodes.summary: Normalizes a raw /model action argument into a trimmed query string, tokenizing to extract the first token.

nodes.name: findModelByQuery
nodes.summary: Resolves a model from a query string using exact id/name matches first, then substring matching as a fallback.

nodes.name: resolveSlashPromptResult
nodes.summary: Resolves the final prompt text and display label from a slash command result input, deriving the label from invokedAs or commandName.

nodes.name: useSlashCommandExecutor
nodes.summary: Hook that parses chat input for slash commands and executes them locally (reset/stop/model) or via tRPC (MCP overview, server-resolved prompts), with toast feedback and analytics tracking.
